events.title: Monday pilot meeting — run Skills 1-4 + meet with target client
events.notes: First real client run under JP's confirmed 5-skill 6-phase pipeline. Skills 1→2→3→4 serially with human review between each; PrepLlamada is the meeting guide; record the call; post-meeting Skill 05 produces the Reporte de Oportunidades; Ricardo + JP mandatory internal review before send. JP offered to practice the meeting beforehand if useful.

events.title: Nexostrat real-capabilities catalog (internal — what we can deliver TODAY)
events.notes: Redirected by JP's redesign — now an internal reference rather than skill-prompt input (JP owns prompts). Useful when discussing solutions with the client during Fase 6 follow-up. Deliverable shape unchanged: 1-pager with service + fixed price + timeline + stack + 'cannot deliver today' list.
